species_context.population_scope: companion dogs under longitudinal veterinary observation
species_context.translation_warning: Do not translate human ophthalmology conclusions directly into veterinary treatment decisions.

packet.research_question: Can repeated owner-observed behavior, medication timing, eye-pressure records, and clinical notes support better organization of veterinary glaucoma research questions?

allowed_claims: organizes multimodal observations for veterinary review
identifies missing evidence needed before stronger claims
disallowed_claims: diagnoses glaucoma subtype from owner notes alone
recommends treatment changes without veterinarian review

data_modalities.name: clinical_record
data_modalities.quality_risk: terminology and measurement protocols may vary by clinic

data_modalities.name: medication
data_modalities.quality_risk: dose timing may be logged late or incompletely

data_modalities.name: behavior_log
data_modalities.quality_risk: subjective owner observations require standardized prompts

longitudinal_structure.baseline_definition: stable period before visible symptom change or medication adjustment
longitudinal_structure.change_event_definition: new swelling, pain behavior, veterinary measurement change, or medication schedule shift

privacy_boundary.deidentification_plan: Use synthetic or aggregate records; remove owner, clinic, date, location, and media identifiers.

packet.falsification_route: Reject the packet if it promotes treatment advice, lacks veterinary review boundaries, or cannot separate observation from diagnosis.
packet.revision_reason: Animal-health AI needs species-aware longitudinal evidence packets rather than generic human-medical schemas.
packet.next_executable_action: Run validator and wire this gate before animal-care memory promotion.
